About Me

Strategic Analytics Consultant with 5.3+ years of experience in post-fraud risk prevention and detection strategy within high-volume fintech and messaging ecosystems.

Expert at leveraging SQL, Databricks, and Splunk to perform complex quantitative research, identify portfolio trends, and translate raw data into actionable recommendations that maximize operational efficiency.

Proven track record in developing and optimizing fraud detection rules, managing account takeover (ATO) investigations, and ensuring strict adherence to data governance and regulatory compliance standards.

Adept at collaborating with cross-functional technology partners to drive mitigation workstreams and enhance fraud detection precision. Experienced across VISA, MasterCard, NPCI, RBL network ecosystems.

Award-winning professional — multi-time Most Valuable Player and GEM Award recipient at Razorpay for outstanding contributions in data-driven fraud prevention and operational excellence.

Work Experience

Feb 2025 — May 2026
Twilio
Current Role

Technical Support Engineer — L2

  • Leading fraud strategy and ATO investigations by analyzing high-volume log data in Splunk, identifying attack patterns, and strengthening account security frameworks.
  • Driving risk mitigation and credential security initiatives by guiding customers on account recovery, exposure handling, and proactive security hardening measures.
  • Ensuring A2P messaging compliance across 10DLC, Toll-Free (TFN), and Short Code frameworks, aligning with carrier regulations and industry standards.
  • Managing vetting and compliance operations including DNA vetting and campaign registration via TCR/DCA portals to enable compliant messaging workflows.
  • Performing advanced root-cause analysis on critical security incidents and collaborating with engineering teams to implement scalable preventive controls.
  • Resolved high-impact account suspensions via advanced log analysis (Splunk/Kibana) to identify ATO patterns — 95%+ CSAT through proactive guidance.
  • Resolved A2P 10DLC campaign rejections by conducting in-depth compliance analysis, restoring campaign approvals with 95%+ CSAT.
  • Owning high-priority support operations in Salesforce and ServiceNow, ensuring SLA adherence and seamless issue resolution.
Apr 2024 — Jan 2025
Razorpay
Senior Analyst

Senior Analyst, Risk Management

  • Conducted detailed merchant profile reviews using onboarding data, KYC documentation, and business model validation to ensure platform security.
  • Monitored real-time merchant transactions using Looker and Databricks dashboards to identify velocity spikes, abnormal failure ratios, and suspicious patterns.
  • Detected potential merchant misuse including payment aggregation and brand impersonation by analyzing transaction behavior against declared business activities.
  • Conducted periodic CDD and EDD reviews for KYC and KYB processes; performed AML sanction screening using Dow Jones and Amlock.
  • Managed inflow alerts for Red Flag Indicators (RFI), NCCT transactions, international high-risk/sanction countries, and customer-level alerts.
  • Prepared Grounds of Suspicious Reports (GOS) for filing Suspicious Transaction Reports (STR) and conducted PEP EDD reviews with risk principal officer approvals.
  • Handled high-risk alerts from FIU, NPCI, VISA (VIRP) and banking partners, providing AML review reports for suspected merchants.
  • Optimized risk alert framework by resolving false-positive triggers, significantly improving investigative focus and fraud detection accuracy.
